chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّهُ لَا يَقَعُ الْإِيلَاءُ إِلَّا بَعْدَ دُخُولِ الرَّجُلِ بِأَهْلِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 57 – The solemn oath does not occur except after the sleeping of the man with his wife

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/225)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (21/225)
text: لَا يَقَعُ الْإِيلَاءُ إِلَّا عَلَى امْرَأَةٍ قَدْ دَخَلَ بِهَا زَوْجُهَا .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, fom Muhammad Bin Al Fuzayl, from Abu Al Sabbah Al Kinany,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The solemn oath does not occur except upon a man who had slept with her’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il from Muhammad ibn al-Fudayl from abu al-Sabbah al-Kinaniy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘ ’Ila’ (swearing) does not take place unless one has gone to bed with his wife.”’
